About Me

I'm a beginner vibecoder passionate about building in public and creating communities where people can grow together. I founded Loxxd — a Telegram community for coders, builders, and grinders who aren't afraid to ship imperfect things and learn on the go.

Loxxd — Telegram Community

A Telegram community I built for vibecoders, builders, and grinders. A space to share wins, ask questions, and connect with others building in public. No gatekeeping — just people doing cool stuff together.

Telegram File To Link Bot

A Telegram bot that converts any file into a direct shareable link instantly. Built for fast file sharing within Telegram without hassle.

Telegram Auto Rename Bot
